mapper.sql: posts.id, posts.title, posts.content, posts.draft_title, posts.draft_content, posts.post_type, posts.content_html, posts.created_at, posts.updated_at, posts.draft_updated_at, posts.view_count, posts.status, posts.category_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts(user_id, title, content, draft_title, draft_content, post_type, category_id) values( #{post.userID}, #{post.title}, #{post.content}, #{post.title}, #{post.content}, #{post.postType}, #{post.categoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET draft_title = #{p.draftTitle}, draft_content = #{p.draftContent}, draft_updated_at = NOW() WHERE posts.user_id = #{p.userID} and posts.id = #{p.id}

UPDATE posts SET title = #{p.draftTitle}, content = #{p.draftContent}, draft_title = #{p.draftTitle}, draft_content = #{p.draftContent}, content_html = #{p.contentHtml}, updated_at = NOW(), draft_updated_at = NOW(), status = "published" WHERE user_id = #{p.userID} and id = #{p.id}
UPDATE posts SET status = "draft" WHERE user_id = #{p.userID} and id = #{p.id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM posts WHERE user_id = #{userID} and id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT posts.id, posts.title, posts.content_html, posts.view_count, posts.created_at, posts.updated_at, posts.user_id, posts.category_id, category.name category_name FROM posts LEFT JOIN category ON posts.category_id = category.id WHERE posts.id = #{postId} AND posts.status = 'published'
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
